overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a modded GTA V showing a character walking along the Venice Beach-style canals in Los Santos. The character traverses pedestrian pathways, crosses a metal bridge, passes residential houses, and climbs stairs to emerge at a street level dominated by a modern cylindrical high-rise.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal-side pedestrian walkway with manicured hedges

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the canal path between tall hedges, approaching a metal bridge

notable_agents.action: woman in teal top walking toward camera
man in dark jacket and cap walking toward camera

entered.detail: calm waterway running parallel to the walkway with concrete edges
white metal truss bridge with wooden deck spanning the canal
tall rectangular glass and steel building visible in the distance
low-rise houses with varied architecture along the canal
tall dense green hedges lining both sides of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow canal path flanked by tall manicured hedges. Two pedestrians approach from the opposite direction. In the distance, a metal pedestrian bridge spans the canal, with modern high-rise buildings visible against a clear blue sky.

events.description: character steps from concrete path onto wooden bridge deck to cross the canal

agents.ego_description: crossing the canal via the pedestrian bridge, looking toward the opposite bank

entered.detail: wooden plank walkway with white metal truss railings
two-story house with blue exterior and red tile roof

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wooden bridge over the canal. The metal truss structure frames the view of a blue stucco house on the far bank. The canal water passes beneath as the character moves from one side to the other.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk along canal with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing residential houses with red awnings and palm trees

notable_agents.action: man in brown outfit standing near house entrance

entered.detail: two-story white stucco house with red canvas awnings over windows
tall palm trees lining the canal edge
large bush with purple flowers in front of white house

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a residential sidewalk next to the canal, passing a white house with red awnings and purple flowering bushes. Palm trees line the canal edge, and a pedestrian stands near a doorway. The metal bridge is now behind and to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal walkway with concrete retaining walls and ivy coverage

events.description: character passes large palm tree trunk temporarily obscuring right side of view

agents.ego_description: continuing along the canal path as the environment becomes more enclosed with walls

notable_agents.action: person in gray jacket walking toward camera along the path

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with rough texture separating path from elevated properties
concrete wall covered in dense green ivy vines
large V-shaped billboard structure visible above the canal

segments.scene_description: The path becomes more enclosed with concrete retaining walls covered in ivy on the left. The character passes a pedestrian and continues toward a distant bridge. A large billboard structure is visible across the canal, and the water is now closer on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase ascending from canal level to street

events.description: character turns left and begins ascending wide stone staircase
character reaches top of stairs and slows before exiting to street level

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs between brick walls to reach the street level above

entered.detail: wide stone steps with dark treads flanked by low walls
gray brick walls lining both sides of the stairwell
tall modern cylindrical building with horizontal glass bands becoming visible at top of stairs

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and ascends a wide stone staircase between brick walls. As the character climbs, a tall cylindrical glass tower becomes visible at the top, marking the transition from the canal level to the street above.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection with modern high-rise architecture

events.description: character emerges from stairwell onto open street with tall cylindrical building dominating view

agents.ego_description: walking onto the sidewalk at street level, approaching the large cylindrical building

notable_agents.action: woman in business attire crossing the sidewalk from left to right

entered.detail: broad concrete sidewalk at street level with traffic lights and street furniture
tall pole with traffic signal and street signs
cars parked along the street curb

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the stairs onto a wide urban street. A massive cylindrical glass tower dominates the center of the view, surrounded by palm trees. A pedestrian crosses the path, and parked cars line the street as the character walks toward the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded canal walkway that gradually ascends into a bustling urban streetscape. It begins along a narrow path flanked by manicured hedges and pedestrians, moving forward toward a metal truss bridge that spans the water. As the camera crosses the bridge, the scene shifts to a residential sidewalk lined with palm trees and colorful houses with red awnings, before the path becomes more enclosed by ivy-covered concrete walls. The perspective then turns left to ascend a wide stone staircase between brick walls, where a tall cylindrical glass tower slowly reveals itself at the summit. Finally, the camera emerges from the stairs onto a wide city street, where the massive glass tower dominates the skyline above parked cars and crossing pedestrians.
